nodes.context: International outlaw motorcycle club founded in Germany in 2003, support club for Bandidos.
Outlaw motorcycle club; Chicanos are a support club for Bandidos.
Outlaw motorcycle club; involved in conflicts with Chicanos.
Hells Angels-affiliated group; raided Chicanos clubhouse in 2009.
Motorcycle club; involved in conflicts with Chicanos.
Group comprised partially of former Underdogs members; involved in shooting incident with Chicanos.
Criminal gang; involved in conflict with Chicanos in Sweden.
Motorcycle club; a chapter patched over to Chicanos in Sweden.

edges.evidence_quote: The Chicanos are a support club (called puppet clubs by law enforcement) for the Bandidos.
edges.context: Chicanos act as a support club for Bandidos.

edges.evidence_quote: Chicanos members assaulted the president of the Hells Angels' nomads chapter in a nightclub in Eberswalde on 6 December 2008.
edges.context: Chicanos and Hells Angels engaged in violent clashes.

edges.evidence_quote: On 5 June 2009, members of the Hells Angels-affiliated Brigade 81 raided the Chicanos' clubhouse in Ludwigsfelde, leaving several club members injured.
Members of the Chicanos and the Underdogs Motorcycle Club fought in the street in Halle city center on 26 October 2010.
edges.context: Chicanos and Underdogs engaged in multiple violent confrontations.

edges.evidence_quote: In June 2013, a member of District 61 – a group comprised partially of former Underdogs members – shot in self-defense at two Chicanos members in Halle city center, although nobody was wounded.
edges.context: District 61 member shot at Chicanos members.

edges.evidence_quote: The Chicanos in Dalsland became involved in a conflict with the Black Cobra gang after attempting to recruit Black Cobra members. On 5 April 2013, members of the Chicanos and Black Cobra rioted in Trollhättan
edges.context: Chicanos and Black Cobra engaged in conflict and riot.

edges.evidence_quote: Sweden's first Chicanos branch opened in Vänersborg in 2012, with a patch-over of a No Surrender chapter.
edges.context: No Surrender chapter patched over to become Chicanos.
